title: conyza cernua
intro: Conyza cernua, also known as fleabane or flat-topped fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to North America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating digestive issues. Conyza cernua is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties. The plant is also valued for its potential to alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory conditions and skin problems, making it a valuable component in natural remedies.
